19c24fce0342ad5e.subject: Re: API Credentials
19c24fce0342ad5e.summary: Rochelle (Ironsail PM) sent follow-up questions to Phil Krupenya (DRx API Lead): (1) Controlled substances via API? (2) Shipment status tracking? Phil K replied - yes controlled substances supported via 'Generate Surescript' with control NDC; tracking via Delivery entity linked to Sale using 'Get a Link' endpoint.
19c24fce0342ad5e.notes: Phil K answered both questions. Controlled substances: use 'Generate Surescript' with control NDC. Tracking: Delivery entity linked to Sale via 'Get a Link' endpoint. Thread resolved.
19c24fce0342ad5e.snippet: Phil K: Yes, controlled substances via API using control NDC. Tracking via Delivery entity linked to Sale.
